meta_description: Discover Bournemouth Carlton Hotel – a seafront hotel on East Cliff with sea views, pools, gym and beach access.
hero_subtitle: Perched on Bournemouth's Famous East Cliff – Dramatic Sea Views Await
quote: Luxury coastal stays with breathtaking Bournemouth Bay views.
discover_desc: A landmark Victorian hotel on Bournemouth’s East Cliff with stunning sea views, pools, dining and direct beach access.
acc_desc: Choose from classic rooms, family suites and sea-view balconies designed for comfort and relaxation.
dining_desc: Modern British cuisine with seasonal ingredients and panoramic sea views.
about_meta_description: Discover Bournemouth Carlton Hotel – a historic seafront hotel on East Cliff with stunning sea views, pools and leisure facilities.
about_hero_desc: Perched on Bournemouth's East Cliff with breathtaking sea views.
about_history_desc: The Bournemouth Carlton Hotel is a historic Victorian-era hotel located on the East Cliff, known for its elegant architecture, dramatic bay views and rich heritage. It has welcomed royalty, celebrities and world leaders throughout its history.
about_war_desc: During World War II, General Eisenhower and Field Marshal Montgomery met here to discuss D-Day plans. Today, the hotel combines timeless charm with modern comfort for unforgettable stays.
location_desc: Situated in the heart of Bournemouth, just steps from the beach, the hotel offers easy access to top attractions and coastal experiences.
val1_desc: Comfortable rooms with sea views, balconies and modern amenities.
val2_desc: Indoor & outdoor swimming pools, gym and relaxation areas.
val3_desc: Frederick’s Restaurant offering modern British cuisine.
val4_desc: Elegant spaces for conferences, weddings and celebrations.
contact_meta_description: Contact Bournemouth Carlton Hotel for bookings, events, dining or general enquiries.
contact_desc: Plan your stay at Bournemouth Carlton Hotel
train_desc: Bournemouth Railway Station is just 10 minutes away with easy taxi access.
car_desc: Located on East Cliff, easily accessible via A338 with parking available nearby.
air_desc: Nearest airport: Bournemouth Airport (15 minutes drive).
gastro_meta_description: Enjoy modern British dining at Bournemouth Carlton Hotel with sea views, afternoon tea and elegant restaurant experiences.
gastro_desc: A Culinary Experience with Stunning Sea Views
gastro_overview_desc: Frederick’s Restaurant offers modern British cuisine with seasonal ingredients, complemented by afternoon teas, elegant dining and breathtaking views of Bournemouth Bay.
rest1_desc: A historic restaurant established in 1947 offering modern British cuisine with seasonal ingredients, elegant interiors and panoramic sea views.
rest2_desc: Relax with cocktails, wines and light meals in a stylish and comfortable setting, perfect after a day at the beach.
rest3_desc: Enjoy traditional British afternoon tea with scones, finger sandwiches and cakes in a charming seaside atmosphere.
rest4_desc: Start your day with a full English or continental breakfast buffet with fresh local ingredients.
cta_desc: Enjoy unforgettable dining experiences with sea views at Bournemouth Carlton Hotel.
ta_meta_description: Discover Bournemouth attractions near Carlton Hotel including beaches, pier, gardens and museums.
ta_overview_desc: Located on the East Cliff, the Carlton Hotel is within walking distance of Bournemouth’s top attractions including beaches, gardens, museums and entertainment venues.
attr1_desc: A world-famous golden sandy beach just 4 minutes walk away.
attr2_desc: Entertainment hub with theatre, arcade and the famous PierZip.
attr3_desc: A unique art museum housed in a historic villa.
attr4_desc: Beautiful gardens perfect for walks, relaxation and family outings.
attr5_desc: Explore marine life including penguins, sharks and turtles.
ta_jasmund_modal: A beautiful sandy beach perfect for relaxing walks, sunbathing and enjoying sea views.
ta_beach_modal: A lively attraction featuring entertainment, dining, arcades and the famous PierZip experience.
ta_museum_modal: A historic villa museum showcasing art, culture and unique collections overlooking the sea.
ta_festival_modal: A peaceful green space in the town centre ideal for relaxing walks and family outings.
ta_cycling_modal: A family-friendly attraction where you can explore fascinating marine life including sharks and turtles.
gallery_meta_description: Explore the Carlton Hotel Bournemouth through our gallery – rooms, dining, pools and sea views.
rooms_meta: Comfortable rooms at Carlton Hotel Bournemouth including classic, family and balcony rooms.
rooms_desc: Comfortable stays with style and relaxation
rooms_text: Carlton Hotel Bournemouth offers a range of comfortable rooms including classic doubles, family rooms and balcony rooms with sea views — perfect for both leisure and business stays.
room_classic_desc: Comfortable double room with modern amenities, ideal for couples and short stays.
room_family_desc: Spacious room designed for families with flexible bedding and extra space.
room_balcony_desc: Enjoy beautiful sea views from your private balcony with relaxing seating.
room_exec_desc: Stylish room with enhanced comfort, workspace and elegant interior design.
hotel_standard_modal: A comfortable double room featuring modern amenities, perfect for couples and short stays.
hotel_superior_modal: Enjoy a relaxing stay with private balcony and stunning sea views.
hotel_junior_modal: Spacious room ideal for families with flexible bedding and extra comfort.
hotel_landauer_modal: Premium room offering elegant interiors, workspace and enhanced comfort.
suites_meta_desc: Luxury suites at Carlton Hotel Bournemouth with sea views, balconies and premium comfort.
suites_hero_desc: Elegant spaces with sea views and premium comfort
suites_desc: Our suites offer spacious interiors, sea views and refined comfort for an unforgettable stay.
suite_exec_desc: Spacious suite with modern interiors and enhanced comfort.
suite_balcony_desc: Private balcony with stunning sea views and relaxing space.
suite_deluxe_desc: Elegant suite with separate lounge and luxury interiors.
suite_premium_desc: Top-tier suite with panoramic views of Bournemouth Bay.
suites_dog_desc1: The Bournemouth Carlton Hotel is a pet-friendly Victorian hotel located on the East Cliff.
suites_dog_desc2: Pets are allowed in selected rooms with a £25 per night fee. Dogs are welcome in lounge areas and outdoor gardens.
apartments_onebed_modal: Spacious suite with modern interiors, workspace and premium comfort.
apartments_twobed_modal: Suite with private balcony offering beautiful sea views and relaxing seating.
apartments_superior_modal: Large suite with separate living area and elegant furnishings.
apartments_deluxe_modal: Luxury suite with panoramic sea views and premium space.
pool_meta: Enjoy indoor and outdoor swimming pools, gym and relaxation at Carlton Hotel Bournemouth.
pool_desc: Relax, unwind and recharge by the sea
pool_text: Carlton Hotel Bournemouth offers indoor and outdoor swimming pools, a fitness centre and relaxing leisure facilities.
indoor_pool_desc: Heated indoor swimming pool perfect for relaxation and year-round enjoyment.
outdoor_pool_desc: Seasonal outdoor pool with sun loungers and relaxing atmosphere.
gym_desc: Fully equipped gym to maintain your fitness during your stay.
relax_desc: Unwind in a calm and peaceful environment.
pool_indoor_modal: Enjoy a heated indoor swimming pool designed for relaxation and comfort.
pool_slide_modal: Stay active in the fitness centre with modern equipment.
pool_river_modal: Relax outdoors by the seasonal pool with sun loungers.
pool_kids_modal: Unwind in dedicated relaxation areas for a peaceful experience.
spa_meta: Relax at Carlton Hotel Bournemouth with spa treatments, wellness experiences and leisure facilities.
spa_text: Enjoy a relaxing wellness experience with spa treatments, calming spaces and access to leisure facilities including pools and fitness areas.
spa_treatment_desc: Indulge in relaxing massages and beauty treatments designed to rejuvenate body and mind.
spa_relax_desc: Unwind in calm and peaceful spaces designed for total relaxation.
spa_pool_desc: Enjoy access to indoor and outdoor pools as part of your wellness experience.
spa_fitness_desc: Stay active with fitness facilities and wellness-focused activities.
spa_cta_desc: Relax and recharge during your stay.
ip_title: Family & Indoor Activities | Carlton Hotel Bournemouth
ip_meta: Family-friendly activities and indoor entertainment at Carlton Hotel Bournemouth.
ip_desc: Fun experiences for children and families
ip_text: Carlton Hotel Bournemouth offers family-friendly experiences with indoor entertainment, leisure activities and nearby attractions perfect for children and families.
games_desc: Enjoy indoor games and activities designed for children and families.
play_desc: Dedicated areas for children to play, explore and have fun safely.
family_desc: Spend quality time together with activities suitable for all ages.
outdoor_desc: Enjoy beach access and nearby attractions for family adventures.
ip_family_text: From beach outings to indoor leisure activities, Carlton Hotel Bournemouth is ideal for families looking for fun and relaxation.
ip_family_note: Nearby attractions and hotel facilities ensure entertainment for all ages.
family_meta: Family-friendly stays at Carlton Hotel Bournemouth with beach access, pools and activities for all ages.
family_text: Carlton Hotel Bournemouth offers a welcoming environment for families with spacious rooms, leisure facilities, and easy access to Bournemouth Beach and nearby attractions.
family_pool_desc: Indoor and outdoor pools for fun and relaxation for all ages.
family_beach_desc: Just a short walk to Bournemouth’s famous sandy beach.
family_garden_desc: Explore nearby gardens and scenic walking routes.
family_games_desc: Enjoy indoor games and family-friendly entertainment.
family_pier_desc: Enjoy arcades, rides and family entertainment at the iconic pier.
family_oceanarium_desc: Discover marine life including penguins, sharks and turtles.
events_meta: Host meetings, weddings and events at Carlton Hotel Bournemouth with sea views and elegant venues.
events_desc: Elegant spaces with stunning sea views
events_text1: Carlton Hotel Bournemouth offers elegant and flexible event spaces ideal for conferences, weddings, corporate meetings and celebrations.
events_text2: With stunning sea views, modern facilities and a dedicated events team, every event becomes a memorable experience.
meyrick_desc: A grand ballroom ideal for conferences, weddings and banquets up to 200 guests.
orangery_desc: A bright and elegant space with sea views perfect for smaller meetings and events.
boardroom_desc: Modern meeting rooms designed for business meetings, training and conferences.
wifi_desc: Reliable internet access for all events.
stay_desc: Guests can stay in rooms and suites on-site.
leisure_desc: Access to pools and wellness facilities.
note: Capacities may vary depending on layout.
plan_desc: Our team will help you create a seamless and memorable event experience.
